name.ja: <ruby>暗<rt>あん</rt></ruby><ruby>黒<rt>こく</rt></ruby><ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt>じん</rt></ruby>の<ruby>導<rt>みちび</rt></ruby>き

requirement.en: When your opponent Sets a monster from their hand, or when a face-up monster(s) on your opponent's field is flipped face-down.

effect.en: Look at 1 face-down monster on your opponent's field. Then, if you have a face-up monster with ATK greater than or equal to [that monster's original ATK] on your field, you can destroy the monster you looked at.
